hard_cases/multi-invoice-in-one-pdf.pdf.description: Two commercial invoices on separate pages in one PDF

assertions.multi_invoice: ProposeRegionsUseCase must return >= 2 Components with entity_type_hint containing 'invoice'

hard_cases/nested-entities-on-one-page.p.description: Single page with BL header, container status table, and inline invoice reference

assertions.parent_linkage: At least one region Component must have parent_component_id set (not null) — denoting a child/nested entity

assertions.no_raise: PdfParser.parse() must not raise — must return a parse-error Component
assertions.zero_or_unknown_regions: ProposeRegionsUseCase must return 0 regions or only regions with entity_type_hint=null/unknown

hard_cases/photo-of-screen.pdf.description: Image-only PDF simulating a photographed screen — no text layer

assertions.no_text_layer: detect_text_layer() must return False for this page
assertions.no_raise: PdfParser.parse() must not raise — routes through OCR path (mocked in unit tests)
